description_long: This is a large, fabric grocery bag with a distinctive autumnal pattern featuring mottled shades of orange, red, and cream. The bag has two wide, black loop handles attached at the top, allowing for easy carrying over the shoulder. A horizontal brown band encircles the bag near its upper third, adding a visual accent and possibly reinforcing the structure. The base of the bag is a darker brown, likely made of a sturdier material for durability and support. The bag appears soft and flexible, with a wide, top-facing opening suitable for carrying groceries or other personal items. No branding or logos are visible, and the bag is currently empty with no contents protruding from the opening.
description: A large, soft grocery bag with an autumnal pattern, black loop handles, and brown accent bands. The bag is empty and features a wide, top-facing opening.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full patterned surface, black handles, and brown accent band.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the bag's narrow profile and the alignment of the handles.
description_view_2: Back view similar to the front, with the same pattern and handle arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the bag's slim profile and handle placement.
